message:
fix(web): add Linux support to wizard step instructions

Several wizard pages had OS-specific instructions (paste commands,
terminal shortcuts, path examples) that only covered Mac and Windows.
Now that Linux is a valid OS option, these pages need to include
Linux-specific guidance:

- generate-ssh-key: SSH folder path, terminal opening, paste/copy keys
- os-selection: Generic GuideTip text (removed "Mac or Windows")
- ssh-connect: Terminal app mention, paste shortcuts
- accounts: Ctrl+click for opening links

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Click Start, type "Terminal", @@ -256,6 +264,7 @@ export default function GenerateSSHKeyPage() { Then paste the command:
    • Mac: Press ⌘ + V

    Then press Enter to run it.

    @@ -392,12 +401,13 @@ export default function GenerateSSHKeyPage() { To copy it:
    • Mac: Triple-click to select the whole line, then ⌘ + C

    • Windows: Triple-click to select, then right-click to copy
    - Open a notes app (like Notes on Mac, or Notepad on Windows) and paste your + Open a notes app (like Notes on Mac, Notepad on Windows, or any text editor on Linux) and paste your public key there. You'll need it later when running the installer (not when creating the VPS—we'll use a password for that).
